_comment: BYOK / BYOM provider profiles for the bench. A profile NAME is passed as --provider <name> (or set BENCH_PROVIDER). API keys are NEVER stored here — only the NAME of the env var that holds the key (key_env). The runner reads that env var at launch; the key never enters config, transcripts, or results. `model` is the default model for the profile and can be overridden with --model. Bare `--model <tag>` with no --provider stays Ollama (the default).

ollama.comment: Local Ollama daemon (the default). For an Ollama CLOUD model, set model to its *-cloud tag and `ollama signin` once; the local daemon proxies it.

openai.comment: OpenAI, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint via OPENAI_BASE_URL.

copilot.comment: GitHub Copilot chat (OpenAI-compatible at api.githubcopilot.com). Provide COPILOT_API_KEY (a Copilot bearer token) OR a GitHub token in GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN authorised for Copilot, which is exchanged for the Copilot token automatically. Requires an active Copilot subscription.
